creator: blaz@amis.net
text:
Fix plist so that we don't complain if shared module directories can not be
removed on deinstallation.

How-To-Repeat: 
Install any p5-Unix-* module, install p5-Unix-Syslog, deinstall
p5-Unix-Syslog, notice that it complains that it can't remove some directories
because they are not empty.
